_comment: Anniversary widget configuration. Set enabled:true (or env ANNIVERSARY_ENABLED=true) to activate on the home page.

objects._comment_dayRange: 0 = today only. Set to 3 for +/-3 day window. For objects this widens milestone years considered.

people._comment_dayRange: 0 = today only. Set to 3 for +/-3 day window.

overrides._comment: Pin specific records to specific dates. Date format: MM-DD. IDs are ES document UIDs. Overrides take priority over query results.

cache._comment: Results rotate every refreshPeriodHours (default 4). Cache TTL is aligned to the next period boundary.
